dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live overview of Shopify orders, customers, support, and transactional mail
dashboard.loading_body: Loading tenant dashboard metrics from the API.
dashboard.orders_loading_body: Loading recent Shopify orders from the API.
dashboard.orders_empty_body: Shopify orders will appear here after sync creates tenant order records.
dashboard.support_loading_body: Loading recent service requests from the API.
dashboard.support_empty_body: Create a support request or wait for customer-facing forms and Aircall events.
dashboard.mail_loading_body: Loading recent transactional deliveries from the API.
dashboard.mail_empty_body: Send a test message or trigger an invitation to create the first delivery.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Define what each role can read and write across the platform
roles.create_subtitle: Pick a name, color and tick the permissions this role can use.
roles.edit_subtitle: Adjust the description, color and permissions for this role.
roles.field_slug_hint: Used as the internal key. Auto-generated from the name.
roles.field_description_placeholder: What this role is responsible for.
roles.delete_confirm: Delete this role? Members will need to be reassigned.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: People who have access to the back panel
users.invite_created_body: Invitation email was queued for {{email}}. Delivery status: {{status}}.
users.password_created_body: {{email}} can sign in with the password you set.
users.aircall_load_failed: Aircall users could not be loaded
users.loading_roles_body: Fetching role choices from the API.
users.no_roles_body: Create a member role before inviting users.

wizard.title: Invite user
wizard.step1_subtitle: Standard roles inherit a curated permission set. You can override later.
wizard.step2_subtitle: We send the invite to this email. The user sets their own password.
wizard.step3_subtitle: Toggle individual capabilities. Inherited rules are highlighted.
wizard.step4_subtitle: An invite email goes out as soon as you confirm.
wizard.send_invite_link: Send invite link instead of setting password now
wizard.custom_role_notice_body: Permission changes are stored as a real member role before the invitation is sent.
wizard.review_custom_role: A custom role will be created from your permission changes.
wizard.review_inherited_role: The selected role permissions will be assigned as-is.
wizard.review_password_set: The member can sign in with the initial password.
wizard.no_write_permission: You need members.write permission to invite members.
wizard.no_roles_write_permission: You need roles.write permission to fine-tune permissions.

commissions.title: Commission rules
commissions.subtitle: Only the Sales Service role is paid commission. Define base rate, tiers, and overrides.
commissions.sales_only_note: Commission rules apply to the Sales Service role only.
commissions.empty_state: No commission profiles yet. Create one to start paying out reps and teams.

rules.title: Rule engine
rules.subtitle: Visual editor for task-generation rules. Author here, the engine consumes the JSON.
rules.banner_title: ENGINE NOT CONNECTED — UI prototype only
rules.banner_body: Rules saved here persist as JSON but do not execute. The runtime executor is on the roadmap; this surface is for nailing the contract + admin UX.
rules.no_selection: Select a rule on the left, or create one.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Shopify orders, pickup signals, and design files
orders.search_placeholder: Search by order #, customer name, email, company…
orders.loading_body: Loading tenant orders from the API.
orders.empty_state: No orders match the current filters.

customers.title: Shopify customers
customers.subtitle: Customer records, order value, lifecycle signals and risk
customers.loading_body: Loading tenant customers from the API.
customers.empty_state: No customers match the current filters.

pricing.title: B2B Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Discount definitions, segment/role overrides and quantity breaks.
pricing.empty_state: No pricing rules yet. Add one to start serving discounted B2B catalogs.
pricing.loading_body: Loading tenant pricing rules from the API.

modal.subtitle: Define who gets the discount, what catalog it applies to, and how it stacks.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: API keys, integrations, and provider configuration

workspace.loading_body: Reading the tenant configuration from the API.
workspace.empty_body: Save a name and badge so navigation, auth and topbar use the tenant record.
workspace.field_badge_hint: Shown when no logo URL is set.
workspace.no_write_permission: You need settings.write permission to update workspace settings.

ai.title: AI provider keys
ai.subtitle: Used by transcript analysis, task proposal, and customer intelligence.

ai_hub_root.title: AI Hub
ai_hub_root.subtitle: Tasks · Usage Log · Services · Prompts · Budget · Health · Settings

aircall.title: Aircall integration
aircall.subtitle: Webhook ingest, dial deep-links, and transcript pipeline.

aircall_hub.label: INTEGRATION
aircall_hub.title: Aircall
aircall_hub.subtitle: Credentials, routing defaults and backfill controls
aircall_hub.subtitle_numbers: Workspace numbers and tenant routing inputs
aircall_hub.subtitle_webhooks: Webhook registration and live delivery state
aircall_hub.subtitle_sync_logs: Recent Aircall sync and health signals

connection.credentials_load_failed: Aircall credential status could not be loaded.
connection.credentials_missing_warning: Aircall users and call ingest will stay unavailable until API ID, API token, and webhook secret are saved for this tenant.
connection.webhook_status_sub: Live state of the webhook registered with Aircall
connection.credentials_sub: Save Aircall credentials into TenantConfig. Values are encrypted at rest and never returned to the browser.
connection.blank_keeps_existing: Leave fields blank to keep existing encrypted values.
connection.credentials_save_failed: Aircall credentials could not be saved
connection.tenant_routing_sub: Phone resolution + default number for outbound calls
connection.enable_click_to_call: Enable click-to-call (aircall:// deep links in CRM)
connection.historical_backfill_sub: Pull past Aircall calls and run them through the full pipeline (ingest → resolve → insight → notifications)
connection.backfill_warning: Warning: Backfill only fetches calls that have not been processed yet (existing ones are skipped). For each call, transcript pull, AI insight generation, and notification broadcast will run — large date ranges may consume significant Anthropic token budget.
connection.backfill_tip: Tip: start with 7 days / 40 pages on first use. If progress stalls, increase the page count and run again — duplicate calls are skipped.
connection.runtime_sub: Webhook registration and backfill require live Aircall credentials first
connection.runtime_disabled_body: Test ping and historical backfill stay disabled until valid Aircall credentials are saved and synced.

numbers_tab.numbers_sub: Use these to configure tenant routing in Configuration tab
numbers_tab.loading_body: Loading Aircall credential status from TenantConfig.
numbers_tab.credentials_required_body: Numbers cannot be synced until this tenant has an Aircall API ID, API token, and webhook secret.
numbers_tab.empty_body: Run sync after credentials are saved. The table only shows numbers returned by Aircall.

webhooks_tab.title: Webhook status
webhooks_tab.sub: Registration, subscribed events and last failure state.
webhooks_tab.name: NAME
webhooks_tab.loading_body: Loading Aircall credential status from TenantConfig.
webhooks_tab.credentials_required_body: Webhook registration is inactive because this tenant is missing Aircall credentials.
webhooks_tab.pending_body: Credentials are saved and webhook delivery metrics will appear after Aircall sends an event.

sync_logs_tab.title: Aircall sync logs
sync_logs_tab.sub: Latest health counts from the call ingestion pipeline.
sync_logs_tab.loading_body: Loading Aircall credential status from TenantConfig.
sync_logs_tab.credentials_required_body: Sync logs cannot be loaded until this tenant has Aircall API credentials.
sync_logs_tab.empty_body: Webhook inbox and sync activity will appear after the first real Aircall sync or webhook event.

shopify.label: INTEGRATION
shopify.title: Shopify Admin API
shopify.subtitle: Customers, orders, and products sync.
shopify.credentials_sub: Blank secret fields keep the encrypted value currently stored for this tenant.
shopify.credentials_required_body: Initial sync needs a Shopify shop domain and Admin API access token.
shopify.blank_keeps_existing: Leave blank to keep existing encrypted value
shopify.no_settings_permission: You need settings.write permission to update Shopify credentials.
shopify.sync_sub: Full backfill for customers, products, and orders. Later webhook and delta sync use the same tenant snapshots.
shopify.sync_loading_body: Loading Shopify sync state from the API.
shopify.empty_body: Run initial sync after credentials are saved. Customers, products, and orders will populate from Shopify.

header.label: INTEGRATION
header.title: AI Hub
header.subtitle: Provider keys, prompt registry, usage log, budget and per-service controls

banner.title: AI Hub
banner.subtitle: 5 AI services (Analytics, Partners, Aircall, Sales, EmailTemplate) — last 24h

usage_log.banner_subtitle: Every Claude call: filter + detail + token breakdown + cost

prompts.banner_subtitle: Prompt registry — version history, usage stats, diff and editor

budget.readonly_note: Read-only here. Cap, threshold and disable-at-cap editing are managed in /admin/ai?tab=settings.

ai_settings.master_toggle_sub: Kill-switch for all AI calls. When turned off, no Claude calls will be made.
ai_settings.master_impact_note: When Master is turned off, Claude calls for all 5 services will stop. Crons (Analytics 08:00, Partners 30min) will be skipped; on-demand calls (Aircall webhook, Sales call, EmailTemplate edit) will fail-graceful → fall back to fallback behavior.
ai_settings.if_disabled_label: If this service is disabled, the following will be affected ({{count}})
ai_settings.model_override_help: Default: model from registry. Override → all calls for this service will use the selected model.
ai_settings.quiet_hours_sub: Pause cron-triggered services during specified hours (on-demand services are not affected)
ai_settings.budget_settings_sub: Monthly cap, alert threshold, hard stop

segments.title: B2B Customer Segmentation
segments.subtitle: Rule-based, DB-centric segment engine for managing packages such as Gold / Silver / Bronze
segments.packages_subtitle: Gold, Silver, VIP and custom lifecycle packages managed by the seller
segments.loading_body: Loading tenant segments from the API.
segments.empty_state: Create the first rule-based segment to start grouping B2B customers.
segments.no_matches_body: Clear the search to see every segment.
segments.no_selection_body: Choose a segment to inspect matches, ownership, and rules.
segments.ownership_subtitle: Assign active members who should own follow-up and sales queues for this segment.
segments.preview_customers_sub: Live sample from the customer table.
segments.preview_empty_body: Evaluate or adjust the rules to produce matched customers.

ownership.title: Segment ownership
ownership.subtitle: Assign a selleruser owner; daily queues and sales assignment caches are invalidated after save.
ownership.no_owner_note: No owner yet. Sales/my-view queues will not receive this segment until an owner is assigned.

segments.shopify_signal_note: {{count}} Shopify customers match the filter, but {{unlinked}} of them are not yet linked to any company. That is why the segment shows zero company results.
segments.customer_signal_subtitle: Shopify customers matching tag, spend, and order conditions.

modal.title: New B2B Segment
modal.subtitle: Define lifecycle packages such as Gold / Silver / Bronze using the step-by-step rule engine.
modal.step3_subtitle: Before saving, see how this segment behaves at the company, user, and Shopify customer level.
modal.rule_helper: Add at least one rule so we can preview matched companies, users, and Shopify customers.
modal.no_preview_yet_note: Write your rules and test them instantly against the database.

tasks.title: Task Management
tasks.subtitle: All work items across customer, sales, comms, calendar, and email surfaces

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Internal chat with online presence — talk to any teammate, see who's available
messages.empty_thread: Select a teammate to start chatting.
messages.compose_placeholder: Type a message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter newline)

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Service requests across customer-facing and internal surfaces
support.loading_body: Loading tenant service requests from the API.
support.empty_state: Create the first support request or wait for customer-facing forms to arrive.
support.search_placeholder: Search by SR, title, customer, email...
support.no_selection_body: Choose a row to see SLA, comments, and workflow actions.

modal.create_subtitle: Create an internal or customer-facing ticket against the tenant data model.

support.reply_placeholder: Type your reply to the customer…

b2b_access.title: B2B Applications

b2b_access.no_matches_body: Clear the search to see every application in this status.

system_mail.title: System mail

system_mail.no_selection_body: Choose a row to inspect provider response, attempts, metadata, and message preview.
